component.name: PaintBrush
component.summary: Simple painting and drawing application for Linux

description.p: PaintBrush is a modern paint program for Linux, built with GTK4 and libadwaita. It offers a comprehensive set of drawing tools in a clean, intuitive interface.

ul.li: Layer support with add, delete, reorder, and visibility toggle
Drawing tools: brush, eraser, line, rectangle, circle, star, polygon, text, fill, spray, arrow
Gradient fill with linear and radial modes
Crop, rotate, flip, and resize canvas
Adjustable brush size, opacity, and stroke width
Color palette with custom color picker and secondary color
Open and save images in PNG, JPEG, GIF, BMP, and WebP formats
Layer system with add, delete, reorder, visibility
Canvas resize with aspect ratio lock
Adjustable stroke width for shape tools
Recent files in welcome screen and menu

description.p: Added About dialog, keyboard shortcuts window, welcome screen, and modern FileDialog API.
